economic_notes: Ontario First Nations Limited Partnership (OFNLP) distributions received of $1,046,730. Casino reserve balance of $4,639,044. Wataynikaneyap Power LP deferred revenue present. Various capital infrastructure projects ongoing including water treatment plant, sewage station, tank farm, and DGS upgrades.
notes: Audit is QUALIFIED due to incomplete tangible capital asset inventory — the First Nation has not fully adopted PSAB Section 3150 and has not gathered complete information for all major classes of tangible capital assets. Two subsidiaries consolidated: Eabametoong First Nation Housing Authority Inc. and Eabametoong Communications Inc. Net financial position is net debt of $682,371. Total government transfers calculated as federal $33,195,132 plus provincial $5,337,302 = $38,532,434. OSR includes OFNLP distributions $1,046,730, other revenue $9,539,391, and replacement reserve $76,366 = $10,662,487. Capital lease obligations of $364,397 excluded from long-term debt figure reported. No schedule of remuneration included in the financial statements provided. Fiscal year 2022 statement issued May 23, 2023 — notably late.
warnings: Qualified audit opinion issued — financial statements may not fully reflect true position
